creator: Cy.Schubert@komquats.com
text:
Jordan,

I am unable to reproduce your problem on my i386 and amd64 testbeds running 
7.0.

Did 4.0.3_2 work correctly?

Would you please forward a copy of your kernel config and a pkg_info 
listing.


-- 
Cheers,
Cy Schubert <Cy.Schubert@komquats.com>
